name: Roasted Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 cups roasted vegetable stock (see above recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Spread all the vegetables out on a baking sheet.
3. Sprinkle with thyme and drizzle with olive oil.
4. Roast for 1 hour or until well browned.
5. Transfer vegetables to a large pot, cover with water, and add bay leaf.
6. Bring to a simmer and cook for 45 minutes.
7. Cool and strain the soup.
8. Heat oil in a large heavy pot.
9. Add onion and celery and cook until tender.
10. Stir in carrots and potatoes and toss to coat.
11. Stir in zucchini.
12. Add chopped tomatoes and stock, and bring to a boil.
13. Reduce heat so that the soup simmers until the potatoes and carrots are tender (about 15-20 minutes).
14. Stir in pasta and peas and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
15. Serve hot.
